choices.text: MS Project (SMB), Primavera P6 (enterprise, large + complex), Procore/Buildertrend (cloud field), Asta Powerproject (UK/global). All do CPM + Gantt + critical path. 4D adds BIM model integration; 5D adds cost dimension.

questions.explanation: MS Project / P6 / Procore standard tools.

choices.text: Save baseline at start. Update actuals weekly/biweekly. Compare actual vs. baseline → variance. SPI = EV/PV: <1 behind schedule. Look-ahead schedule (3-6 week) for tactical trades coordination.
